headline: Snap-on Incorporated to Webcast 2026 Second Quarter and Six-Month Results Conference Call
summary: KENOSHA, Wis., July 09, 2026--Snap-on will release 2026 second quarter and six-month results on Thursday, July 23, 2026 with a call discussing the results to follow at 10:00 am ET.
